content:
感谢各位守密人的支持！
《忘却前夜》OST：凯蒂古拉EP·烈火的葬礼，今日发布～欢迎大家收听、下载及分享～如果有基于OST的二次创作，也欢迎分享给我们！（二创请遵照同人规则，OST内容请勿商用）

忘却前夜OST：凯蒂古拉EP·烈火的葬礼
燃烧吧，燃烧吧，将属于你的一切，尽数燃烧吧。
然后在那无尽的烈火中，开启你和世界的葬礼吧！

作曲：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
规划：B.I.A.V. Studio

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Thank you for your support!

Morimens OST："Kathigu-Ra EP: Funeral in Flames" was released today. 
Welcome everyone to listen, download and share. If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

Morimens OST："Kathigu-Ra EP: Funeral in Flames"
Burn, burn, let all that is yours be consumed in flames.
Then, in the boundless fire, let the funeral for you and this world commence!

Composer：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
Planning：B.I.A.V. Studio
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：凯蒂古拉EP·烈火的葬礼
